name: TextHumanize bad-output regression bank
description: Known-bad humanization outcomes turned into permanent regression tests. Add a new entry whenever an issue or Promopilot case reveals a defect, then the test suite enforces the fix forever.
contribution_rules: Use synthetic or fully anonymized text only; never include customer data.
Describe the original defect and pick deterministic checks.
Set a seed so the regression is reproducible.

entries.input: Acme Cloud helps teams ship faster. Read the guide at https://acme.example.com/docs and contact support@acme.example.com for help.
entries.description: Brand name, URL and email must survive marketing humanization.

entries.input: Your order ORD-8421 for $49.99 shipped on 2026-06-01 with tracking SKU-THZ-2026.
entries.description: Identifiers, prices and dates must not be rewritten in support copy.

entries.input: Наша команда выпускает обновление продукта на следующей неделе. Документация доступна на сайте.
entries.description: Russian humanization must not leak English connectors or duplicate articles.

entries.input: This launch is huge. We are excited to share it with everyone today.
entries.description: High-intensity social humanization must not stack punctuation or double spaces.

entries.input: Sample size looked right. Geographic spread looked right.
entries.description: Client-reported (0.31.1): minimal/only_flagged mode must not eat the space after a sentence-ending period.
